response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist software engineer with ~15 years of experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js skills, and current hands-on exposure to MCP and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and the candidate's demonstrable GenAI experience spans roughly one year. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, LLM optimization, or Python — all core to this position. While the engineering craftsmanship and customer-facing workshop experience are genuine assets, the AI-specific depth gap is too large for a staff-level forward-deployed GenAI role.
strengths: Current hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow infrastructure
15+ years of broad production engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong communication and mentorship record via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI work)
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability, or Python experience
Limited demonstrated cloud AI-system design; cloud exposure is mostly AWS CDK for a pricing platform

key_factors.factor: Relevant MCP/agentic tooling and strong engineering fundamentals
